assumptions.groups_supported: Unique public group names in the current public map source. Repeat entries are counted separately as returning/repeat support.
assumptions.public_entries: Number of public source rows used to build the map. This may be higher than unique groups because some groups appear more than once.
assumptions.young_people_reached: Placeholder estimate using one kit per young person. Adjust if your public reporting uses a different assumption.
assumptions.map_counts: Map popups show kit bands rather than exact per-district or per-group quantities.
